title: Finite BDF2 Method Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite BDF2 bad implicit multistep QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational two-step BDF2 replay for y' = -y with h = 1/2 computes first multistep next_state = 5/12, while a malformed row claims next_state = 1/3, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional implicit multistep rows only when they add distinct endpoint-solve, history initialization, stability polynomial, variable-step, floating-point, or convergence-theorem pressure; keep general linear multistep theory in future Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed ODE, step size, starter value, history states, endpoint derivatives, BDF2 residuals, and monotone finite decay table as deterministic rational replay obligations.
Route the false first BDF2 multistep update through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact next state.
Expose the pack through finite dynamics/time-stepping, numerical-analysis, real-analysis, and learner query surfaces.

Keep general BDF2 order, consistency, zero-stability, convergence, variable-step behavior, floating-point time-stepping correctness, and PDE method-of-lines theory marked as future Lean or numerical-honesty work until formal routes exist.
